entities.name: SWEET SORGHUM
entities.description: A crop cultivated on heavy metal-contaminated soils for bioethanol production and phytoremediation.

entities.name: HEAVY METALS
entities.description: Metals or semi-metals that cause toxicity to humans, plants, and animals and act as environmental pollutants.

entities.name: PHYTOREMEDIATION
entities.description: An approach using plants to remove or neutralize contaminants from soil.

entities.name: BIOETHANOL
entities.description: A biofuel produced from the cultivation of sweet sorghum.

entities.name: TOXICITY
entities.description: The quality of being toxic or poisonous, a key characteristic of heavy metals.

entities.name: LEAD
entities.description: A heavy metal used in water pipes and pigments, acting as an environmental pollutant.

entities.name: MERCURY
entities.description: A heavy metal previously used in medicines and teething pain killers.

entities.name: CADMIUM
entities.description: A heavy metal used in rechargeable batteries.

entities.name: BIOREMEDIATION
entities.description: The use of biological organisms to remove or neutralize pollutants from a contaminated site.

entities.name: TOXIC METALS
entities.description: A category of heavy metals including Hg, Cr, Pb, Zn, Cu, Ni, Cd, As, Co, and Sn.

entities.name: PRECIOUS METALS
entities.description: A category of heavy metals including Pd, Pt, Ag, Au, and Ru.

entities.name: RADIONUCLIDES
entities.description: A category of heavy metals including U, Th, Ra, and Am.
